query: SELECT gameId, awayPitcherName, awayPitcherMlbamId, homePitcherName, homePitcherMlbamId FROM mlb_lineups WHERE gameId IN (2250007,2250008,2250009,2250010,2250011,2250012,2250013,2250014,2250015,2250016,2252284) ORDER BY gameId
